---
emoji: "🏥"
name: workflow-failure-doctor
description: Investigates failed runs of the 00.01 GHCP demonstration workflow and creates a diagnostic issue.
on:
  workflow_run:
    workflows: ["00.01-ghcp-workflow-with-failure"]
    types: [completed]
  label_command:
    name: workflow-doctor
    events: [pull_request]
  workflow_dispatch:
max-daily-ai-credits: 1000
permissions:
  actions: read
  contents: read
  issues: read
  pull-requests: read
  checks: read
network: defaults
safe-outputs:
  create-issue:
    expires: 1d
    title-prefix: "[Workflow Failure Doctor] "
    labels: [workflow-failure, automated-diagnosis]
    close-older-issues: true
  add-comment:
    max: 1
    hide-older-comments: true
  noop:
tools:
  cli-proxy: true
  cache-memory: true
  github:
    mode: gh-proxy
    toolsets: [default, actions]
timeout-minutes: 20
steps:
  - name: download-workflow-failure-logs
    if: github.event_name == 'workflow_run'
    env:
      GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      REPOSITORY: ${{ github.repository }}
      RUN_ID: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.id }}
    run: |
      mkdir -p /tmp/gh-aw/agent
      gh api "repos/$REPOSITORY/actions/runs/$RUN_ID/jobs" \
        --jq '[.jobs[] | select(.conclusion != "success") | {name, conclusion, html_url, steps: [.steps[] | select(.conclusion != "success") | {name, conclusion, number, started_at, completed_at}]}]' \
        > /tmp/gh-aw/agent/failed-jobs.json
---

# Workflow Failure Doctor

You are a workflow failure diagnostic agent for the calculator workshop repository.
The workflow named `00.01-ghcp-workflow-with-failure` has completed. Diagnose
only failed runs and avoid creating duplicate reports for the same run.

## Your Task

1. Read the failed job details from `/tmp/gh-aw/agent/failed-jobs.json`
2. Check cache-memory for key `diagnosed-runs` to avoid duplicate reports.
3. Identify the root cause of the failure.
4. Determine the likely culprit commit, branch, pull request, or manual run.
5. Suggest the smallest safe fix and the command or workflow rerun needed to
   verify it.

## Expected Diagnosis For Exercise 99.06

The demonstration failure is intentionally created by the step named
`intentional-failure-for-exercise-99-06` in
`.github/workflows/00.01-ghcp-workflow-with-failure.yml`. The expected fix is
to set `DEMO_FAILURE` to `false` or remove the intentional failure step after
the learner observes this diagnostic workflow.

## Output Rules

* If triggered by `workflow_run` and the conclusion is not `failure`, call
  `noop`.
* If triggered by `workflow_run` and the failure is new, create a diagnostic
  issue with the failing workflow name, run URL, failed job or step, root cause,
  recommended fix, and validation step.
* If triggered by `label_command` on a pull request, add one diagnostic comment
  with the same information.
* If cache-memory shows that the run was already diagnosed, call `noop`.
